sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n82062" key="peri/rrupos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">περίρρῠπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n82062.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">all dirty</tr_>, cj. in <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Crates Theb.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">4</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
